name: I/O Schema Enforcement
owns: Typed boundary validation for skills, tools, agent outputs, and inter-agent messages
must_never: Allow untyped payloads to cross governed boundaries silently
Produce generic errors instead of field-level diagnostics
Return valid=True for missing schema on governed boundaries
Allow silent coercion without audit record
notes: 8 boundary schemas, 3 coercion modes, field-level diagnostics, drift detection. 7 corrections from Brian applied: governed boundary failure, rich metadata, unknown fields explicit, any flagged, version compat, richer recovery context, audit outcome types.
